commands.notes: Codex plugins cannot register slash commands (skills only). The plugin ships the skills; the explicit slash surface is this custom prompt, namespaced as /prompts:hephaestus.
Fallback user command is also installable at ~/.gemini/commands/hephaestus.toml.
Installed by scripts/install-all-runtimes.sh. Project-scope fallback ships at .agents/workflows/hephaestus.md. Antigravity also auto-loads AGENTS.md and .agents/skills/.
Implicit/skill surface: codex/plugins/agentlas-core-engine-meta-agent/skills/hephaestus-network/SKILL.md ($hephaestus-network). Tool surface: mcp_servers.hephaestus-network in ~/.codex/config.toml.
Fallback user command is also installable at ~/.gemini/commands/hephaestus-network.toml.
Project-scope fallback ships at .agents/workflows/hephaestus-network.md.
Cursor ≥1.6 supports commands (~/.cursor/commands), Cursor ≥2.4 skills (~/.cursor/skills, ~/.agents/skills). cursor/plugin/ is the marketplace-ready bundle.
Per-project rule fallback; reacts to /hephaestus, /hephaestus-network, and @Hephaestus mentions.
OpenCode also reads the universal skill at ~/.agents/skills/hephaestus-network and supports MCP (opencode/README.md).
AgentSkills spec; native /hephaestus-network registration follows commands.nativeSkills. Also loaded from ~/.agents/skills.
AgentSkills spec skill; MCP server registration in ~/.hermes/config.yaml (hermes/README.md).

Owner-scoped leg of the three-scope model: searches ONLY the signed-in user's own cloud packages (보관함), call-priced at a flat 1 credit. Maps to `hephaestus route --scope cloud` (implies --hub-only, cargo.* owner query).
Implicit/skill surface: codex/plugins/agentlas-core-engine-meta-agent/skills/hephaestus-cloud/SKILL.md ($hephaestus-cloud). Tool surface: hephaestus_cloud_search in mcp_servers.hephaestus-network.
Fallback user command is also installable at ~/.gemini/commands/hephaestus-cloud.toml.
Project-scope fallback ships at .agents/workflows/hephaestus-cloud.md.
Owner cloud (보관함) only. cursor/plugin/ is the marketplace-ready bundle.
OpenCode also reads the universal skill at ~/.agents/skills/hephaestus-cloud and supports MCP (hephaestus_cloud_search).
AgentSkills spec; native /hephaestus-cloud registration follows commands.nativeSkills. Also loaded from ~/.agents/skills.
AgentSkills spec skill; MCP server registration in ~/.hermes/config.yaml (hephaestus_cloud_search tool).
Owner-scoped (scope=cloud) sibling of hephaestus_route: searches only the signed-in user's own cloud packages (보관함).
hephaestus cloud "<request>" is shorthand for hephaestus route "<request>" --scope cloud (owner cloud / 보관함 only).
stdio MCP server for any MCP-capable harness, incl. Ollama-launched local models (Gemma, DeepSeek): docs/local-models.md.
Generic fallback for AGENTS.md-compatible and local-model runtimes (Gemma, Hermes-like): see docs/runtime-fallback-adapters.md.
hephaestus "<request>" is shorthand for hephaestus route "<request>".

postCreationUserMessage.template: global_commands: Claude Code /hephaestus, /hephaestus-network, /hephaestus-cloud; Codex /prompts:hephaestus (or $hephaestus-network / $hephaestus-cloud skill); Gemini CLI /hephaestus, /hephaestus-cloud; Antigravity /hephaestus, /hephaestus-cloud; Cursor /hephaestus-network, /hephaestus-cloud; OpenCode /hephaestus-network, /hephaestus-cloud; OpenClaw /skill hephaestus-network or /skill hephaestus-cloud; Agentlas terminal hephaestus, hephaestus cloud, or agentlas run hephaestus. Three-scope model: /hephaestus-cloud = my own cloud packages (보관함, 1 credit/call); /hephaestus-network = public Hub marketplace; plain language = local + cloud + Hub combined.
